text: The word ‘David’ is not given by some manuscripts of the Septuagint Greek; it may be a misleading footnote which has crept into the text, the real reference being, not to David, but to Asa.
The hill-shrines referred to must have been those of false gods, not of the Jewish religion; cf. III Kg. 22.44.
The words ‘from Benjamin’ are omitted, probably by accident, in the Latin.
